Our
Verification
Process

Every property listed on Orvane Atlas has been personally assessed by our team. We only list what we have verified — because your capital deserves nothing less.

Title Verification
We verify ownership, title documentation, and confirm no encumbrances or disputes before listing.
Legal Review
Every listing is reviewed by a qualified property lawyer for legal compliance in its jurisdiction.
Physical Inspection
Our team or appointed local partners conduct on-site inspection before any property goes live.
Ongoing Monitoring
Listed properties are monitored for status changes. We update or remove listings when circumstances change.
Real Assets. Real Returns.

A real estate brokerage and investment advisory firm serving buyers, sellers, and investors across Africa and global markets. Incorporated in Nigeria as Orvane Atlas Limited.
